race.comment: This is competitive. BETTER THAN WORDS (9) resumed with a comfortable CL4 win here over 1200m and then lacked finishing dash in easier under 60kg. She's won 2/2 third-up and gets in well with the 3kg claim. Strips fitter and she looks the testing material. DETERMINATION (7) was below his best last time in a 65 at Mackay, but his form here prior stacks right up. He will likely push forward and can bounce back into contention. SUJEED (11) found one better over 1300m at this track/grade, beaten just 0.7 lengths. Has been briefly freshened, and he always puts in. Settles back and will hit the line hard. VICTORY'S GHOST (6) went close here and then deserves his 65 win over 1200m at Thangool. Draws handy and races forward. In the mix.
